question: What text is displayed on the orange banner in the lower left corner? A. HOW TO MAKE B. LIMOR SUSS C. GHOULISH GRAVE D. Twizzlers

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A rectangular chocolate cake features dark frosting covered in orange and purple sprinkles. Vertical chocolate wafer bars form a fence border around the perimeter. White chocolate tombstones with black writing sit on the surface alongside white marshmallow ghosts. Black licorice sticks are inserted into the back to resemble trees. A woman in a purple top stands behind the counter gesturing near the dessert.

question: Which of the previously seen people is back on screen? A. <person's hand with light skin tone wearing a silver ring> B. <woman with long dark wavy hair wearing a dark purple v-neck top> C. <woman wearing a purple long-sleeved top and a small black witch hat> D. <woman wearing a dark purple long-sleeved top and a black oven mitt>

Describe the sequence of key visual events and actions occurring throughout the video regarding the cake and presenter.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text overlays appear on a decorated cake; at 4s, a woman gestures behind a counter; at 10s, a hand reaches over the graveyard cake; at 12s, the hand places a ghost candy on the frosting; at 14s, cauldron bowls filled with candy are shown.
